calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-23-2009 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Nov-12-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Arlene Howell, #2514.

Christine Marcelli, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Chase Bank USA, N.A. a corporation.
Cheri Gorman, Custodian of Records for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Carl Ernst.
Default was entered against defendant on July 27, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed on July 27, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Chase Bank USA, N.A. a corporation, and against the Defaulted Defendant Carl Ernst as follows:

Damages/Principal - $46,703.87.
Prejudgment Interest - $2,533.53.
Attorney Fees - $0.00.
Costs - $423.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $49,660.40.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-15-2009 Continued To Dec-04-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
